title: Subtextual Meaning behind Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Subtextual Meaning behind Evangelion             Quote Post by ClassyCrusader0330 » Mon May 27, 2019 11:14 pm Hey guys, long time listener first time caller, sorry if this isnt the right place for this. Made a video talking about the subtextual meaning behind evangelion. What Hideaki may have been trying to say from a directors point of view that pushed each character to their dialogue and story. Hope you enjoy! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3ll47ToIp6o
